note: Lane A IPC refactoring completed. The smart_sd/batch tools don't accept regex and require unique literal matches — this works well for most cases but becomes cumbersome when the same string literal appears at multiple call sites. For store names like getStore("desktop-custom-agents") that appear 3+ times identically, had to restructure code to use unique context or batch. Overall the workflow of delegate subagents → curate context worked well. The smart tools rerouting of bash commands to their smarter equivalents (smart_git, smart_sd) sometimes broke complex shell pipelines — hand-resolving rerouted commands was friction.
